levels.title: Center Content with Flexbox #1
levels.description: Modify the container to center its children horizontally.

levels.title: Create a 2-Column Grid #2
levels.description: Define two equal columns for the grid container.

levels.title: Set Text Transparency #3
levels.description: Change the heading color to be 50% transparent white.

levels.title: Fix Box Sizing #4
levels.description: Ensure padding doesn't increase the element's width.

levels.title: Add Hover Smoothness #5
levels.description: Add a 0.3s transition for the background color.

levels.title: Absolute Centering #6
levels.description: Set the child's position to absolute to allow centering.

levels.title: Bold Heading #7
levels.description: Increase the weight of the heading text.

levels.title: Button Hover Effect #8
levels.description: Change the cursor to a pointer when hovering over a button.

levels.title: Hide Element Properly #9
levels.description: Remove the element from the layout entirely.

levels.title: Rounded Corners #10
levels.description: Make the box corners perfectly rounded.
